import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { updateSeo } from '../../utils/seoHelper'; import styles from './Home.module.css'; import { FaCode, FaMobileAlt, FaCloud, FaCogs, FaRocket, FaShieldAlt, FaChartLine, FaUsers, FaCheck, FaStar, FaQuoteLeft } from 'react-icons/fa'; const testimonials = [ { id: 1, name: "Liam Thompson", role: "Founder at TechFlow", text: "Kognivex delivered our SaaS platform ahead of schedule with exceptional code quality. Their engineering team is top-notch and truly understands the needs of a scaling startup.", rating: 5 }, { id: 2, name: "Sophia Chen", role: "CEO at EduScale", text: "The most reliable development partner we've ever worked with. They truly understand scalable architecture and were able to handle our complex requirements with ease.", rating: 5 }, { id: 3, name: "Marcus Rodriguez", role: "Director, PrimeLogistics", text: "Transformed our complex manual processes into a seamless automated system. Their solution has increased our operational efficiency by 40% in just six months.", rating: 5 }, { id: 4, name: "Jessica Lee", role: "Product Manager at InnovateX", text: "Professional, transparent, and technically brilliant. They are more than just a vendor; they are a strategic partner that helped us navigate critical architectural decisions.", rating: 5 } ]; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const [activeSlide, setActiveSlide] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { updateSeo({ title: 'Kognivex | Web Development & SaaS Solutions Company', description: 'Build Scalable Software That Grows Your Business. Kognivex is a leading web development and SaaS solutions company helping startups and businesses.', }); const interval = setInterval(() => { setActiveSlide(prev => (prev + 1) % testimonials.length); }, 5000); return () => clearInterval(interval); }, []); return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}

Web Development & SaaS Solutions Company

Build Scalable Software That Grows Your Business

Kognivex is a leading web development and SaaS solutions company helping startups and businesses build scalable, high-performance applications.

{/* TOP WEB DEVELOPMENT COMPANY (LEFT + RIGHT) */}

Top Web Development Company for Scalable Solutions

Kognivex provides end-to-end software development services including web development, SaaS platforms, mobile app development, and enterprise systems.

We help startups and businesses build scalable digital products using modern technologies, ensuring performance, security, and long-term growth.

Why Businesses Choose Us

  • Scalable architecture
  • High-performance systems
  • Secure development
  • Modern tech stack
{/* CORE SERVICES (HEADING ADDED) */}

Our Core Services

We deliver scalable and high-performance solutions tailored for modern businesses.

Web Development

Custom web development services using modern technologies like React, Node.js, and scalable cloud architecture.

Mobile Apps

High performance Android and iOS mobile applications with seamless user experience.

SaaS Platforms

Scalable SaaS platform development with secure cloud-based infrastructure.

Enterprise Systems

Enterprise software solutions to automate workflows and business operations.

{/* STATS / TRUST SECTION */}

Trusted by Businesses

50+

Projects Delivered

30+

Happy Clients

5+

Years Experience

100%

Client Satisfaction

{/* WHY CHOOSE US (GRID - 4 COLUMNS) */}

Why Choose Us

Performance First

Fast, optimized, and scalable web applications built for performance.

Secure Systems

Secure software development with enterprise-level protection.

Scalable Architecture

Future-ready architecture designed for scaling businesses.

Client Focused

Client-focused development tailored to your business goals.

{/* TESTIMONIALS SLIDER */}

What Our Clients Say

{testimonials.map((t) => (

{t.text}

{[...Array(t.rating)].map((_, i) => )}

{t.name}

{t.role}

))}
{testimonials.map((_, i) => ( setActiveSlide(i)} /> ))}
{/* CTA SECTION */}

Ready to Build Your Digital Future?

); } export default Home;
